name: player_adp range year_offset with no where-clause still registers the CTE
description: Range year_offset with no where-clause skips the source join (skip_join_for_offset_range); register_ctes still registers the offset-expanded adp CTE so the correlated AVG subquery references a defined relation instead of emitting invalid SQL.
expected_query: with "t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982" as (select "player_adp_index"."pid", "player_adp_index"."year", "player_adp_index"."adp", "player_adp_index"."min_pick", "player_adp_index"."max_pick", "player_adp_index"."std_dev", "player_adp_index"."sample_size", "player_adp_index"."percent_drafted" from "player_adp_index" inner join "adp_format" on "player_adp_index"."adp_format_id" = "adp_format"."id" where "player_adp_index"."source_id" in ('SLEEPER') and "player_adp_index"."year" in (2024, 2025) and "adp_format"."scoring_class" in ('PPR') and "adp_format"."num_qb" in (1) and "adp_format"."duration" in ('REDRAFT') and "adp_format"."draft_pool" in ('ALL') and "adp_format"."contest_style" in ('MANAGED')) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT AVG(t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982.adp) FROM t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982 WHERE t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982.pid = player.pid AND t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982.year IN (2024,2025)) AS "adp_0", "player"."pos" from "player" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
